label: AGENTS
caption: every session claims a desk across floors — typing, wandering, coffee runs. Workflow fleets get desks too: a 91-agent review of this repo ran in this office.

label: OPENCLAW
caption: run an OpenClaw gateway and a lobster scuttles in — its wander encodes the daemon's health: idle ambles, busy shuttles to the backend coders, a failing model flushes it sickly-red, shutdown walks it out.

label: DASHBOARD

variants.name: Tab ⇥ agent tree
variants.blurb: every floor's agents in one foldable tree

variants.name: Zoom in
variants.blurb: badges, activity tints, the tree up close

caption: press Tab — the whole building's roster, badged by CLI

label: MEETINGS
caption: idle agents drift to the meeting room — “no tests?” “trust me” “ship it!”

label: PETS
caption: a cat roams the floor — click to pet

label: SPACES
caption: take the office tour — every corner is alive

label: THEMES
caption: press t in the app — the whole office retints

label: WEATHER
caption: rain day: productivity +12% · lighting tracks your real clock
